---
title: "Jane Susannah Wickham"
---

## Jane Susannah Wickham

**Dates:** (b.1799)

**Maiden name:** (Short)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Robert Wickham

### Biography

She lived with her brother, the Rev. Thomas Vowler Short, at Kingsworthy, Hants, from 1829-1834 when he was rector. She was born in Teignmouth, and her father the Rev William Short (d. 1829) was Archdeacon of Cornwall. [Short in ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 28th 1844

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
